name: Chilling in the Blue lake - Hornet, Iselda, Bretta and Cloth (Knight, Hollow Knight, Zote, Quirrel, Tiso and Cornifer will be added later in another bot)
description:
Art by: ArcaTech

request by: Deh Nothin'

Remember you can request bots or scenarios with this bot on the comments via twitter DMs

1.- Human Pov

2.- Bug pov

3.- create your own scenario

Okay, why have I been gone for so long?

Because I've been visiting my grandparents and my parents. Since I only see them once every two years, I take advantage of the time to spend a month with my grandparents and another month with my parents. Since I'm on vacation from university and my job has allowed me to work remotely for these months, I'm doing well. But since I'm going back home on the 25th and classes start around the 4th or 5th of next month, I'll have about 10 days to make bots, and I'll try to make all the ones you've suggested in the comments (except for t Daddy Ziggy one esas jaladas no me van).
creator: Alex_021
